__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Von Neumann Arch.,Mysterious Relic
|rank=orange
|amount=2
|category=self
|description=Per 1k Species War Tech Pts., Snail ATK +7; Species War Tech Pts: 30,000/30,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Species War Tech Points]]
